title: Update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.7.1
body:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sigstore/fulcio](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio) | `v1.6.6` -> `v1.7.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.6.6/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/fulcio (github.com/sigstore/fulcio)</summary>

### [`v1.7.1`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v171)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.7.0...v1.7.1)

v1.7.1 contains a bug fix for extensions for CI providers where the OIDC claims
include HTML escape characters. If a client attempted to verify an extension value,
verification would fail unless an HTML-escaped string was used in the comparison.
Extension values will no longer be escaped.

#### Bug Fixes:

- Do not HTML-escape extension values ([#​2023](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2023))

### [`v1.7.0`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v170)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.6.6...v1.7.0)

v1.7.0 includes a change to how proof of possession signatures are verified.
Fulcio has updated the expected hashing algorithm for ECDSA P-384 and P-521
signatures to be SHA-384 and SHA-512, in line with CSR signature verification.
Cosign is actively being updated to support this for when signing with a
managed key and requesting a certificate.

#### Features

- Allow configurable client signing algorithms ([#​1938](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1938))
- Use different hash in proof of possession based on key ([#​1959](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1959))
- Tls verification on OIDC issuers ([#​1932](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1932))
- feat: adds cert-utility. ([#​1870](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1870))
- feat: makes leaf optional and other changes.  ([#​1931](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1931))

#### Bug Fixes

- Remove err impossible condition: nil != nil ([#​1934](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1934))
- mark principal and issuer class under pkg/identity as deprecated ([#​1980](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/1980))

#### Contributors

- Carlos Tadeu Panato Junior
- Hayden B
- ian hundere
- Praful Khanduri
- Ramon Petgrave
- Riccardo Schirone
- Sujal Gupta

</details>
